title: Remote Bootstrap
description: Browser host for standalone Studio — **Remote Bootstrap**. Does not load a project kernel; users supply an API base URL and optional token before the shared `@specd/ui` IDE mounts.
context: Browser host for standalone Studio — **Remote Bootstrap**. Does not load a project kernel; users supply an API base URL and optional token before the shared `@specd/ui` IDE mounts.

rules.requirement: connection is required before SpecdApp mounts
rules: On cold start, the app MUST show `ui:connect-panel` until `GET /v1/project` (or health) succeeds against the configured base URL.
API base URL and optional token MUST persist in browser storage and restore on reload.

scenarios.requirement: connection is required before SpecdApp mounts
scenarios.name: Cold start shows connect panel
then: AND SpecdApp is not mounted yet

scenarios.requirement: connection is required before SpecdApp mounts
scenarios.name: Successful health mounts IDE

scenarios.requirement: connection is required before SpecdApp mounts
scenarios.name: Failed test keeps gate
Saved profile restores URL on reload
then: AND user can connect without retyping host

scenarios.name: Token persistence follows remember setting
then: AND session may keep token in memory only

scenarios.name: Clear profile removes stored entry
then: AND connect gate shows on next load
